title: Cotswolds, GBR — 2-Bed Cabin
description: A 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom one-of-a-kind property set on Marley Lake, the Lakeside Cabin features a double-height open-plan living area with dining space and an extensive outdoor entertaining deck. Open up the large retractable doors to truly bring the outdoors inside and watch as the sun sets with a glass of your favourite Rosé and the delicious treats you picked up from The Lakes Bar & Kitchen.

title: Fayence, France — 6-Bed Villa
description: Some places immediately feel right. This dream home brings together rich history, refined modern comfort, and panoramic views over the lush Provencal landscape. Located in the historic center of the charming village of Fayence, Villa Soie offers complete privacy. Once a silk factory, it has been thoughtfully renovated. The result is a harmonious balance between authentic character and refined contemporary comfort.

title: Palma, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Mallorca and Palma invite you to enjoy quality of life all year round. In this exclusive townhouse you will enjoy three spacious bedrooms, a private swimming pool and parking. The terrace and garden are designed to create life both inside and out. Located in the heart of the sought-after Son Espanyolet, combining quiet village idyll with the pulse of the city just a short walk from exclusive restaurants of Santa Catalina.

title: Higueron, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description: In the delightful area of Higueron on the sunny Costa del Sol, this elegant corner apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms. The living room and kitchen are designed with an open-plan layout, with the 36m2 private terrace serving as a natural extension with Mediterranean views. The home includes professionally designed interiors with all furniture and equipment included, fully turnkey and ready for use.

title: Mouans-Sartoux, France — 7-Bed Villa
description: Set between the storied villages of Valbonne and Mougins, Villa Castellaras offers a serene base from which to savour the Cote d Azur. Within short drive to golf courses, medieval squares and Michelin-starred restaurants, while the glamour of Cannes is just down the road. Set on a 5,000m2 lush gated plot with total privacy, the 344m2 neo-provencal villa features seven bedrooms and a stunning pool.

title: Apricale, Italy — 3-Bed Villa With Infinity Pool
description: Liguria and the historic Italian Riviera have a timeless appeal, and Villa Apricus fulfills the dream of la dolce vita. Perfectly positioned between the Italian and French Rivieras, Apricale is just 15 minutes to the Mediterranean, 40 minutes to Monaco. With its classic stone facade, landscaped gardens on the 4,200m2 plot, and a large infinity pool with breathtaking views, the villa offers a serene escape ready to enjoy from arrival.

title: Santanyi, Spain — 5-Bed Villa With Pool
description: Nestled in the tranquil countryside near Es Llombards, Villa Cascada is a newly constructed finca blending traditional Mallorcan architecture with contemporary luxury. With its classic stone facade, landscaped gardens on the 14,300m2 plot, and large saltwater pool with a waterfall. Inside the 300m2 villa, natural materials include oak parquet and marble, paired with underfloor heating, Miele appliances, and a Sonos sound system.

title: Higueron, Spain — 3-Bed Penthouse With Sea Views
description: Welcome to the exclusive Higueron area on the Costa del Sol. The elegant Seaview Penthouse offers spectacular uninterrupted views over the Mediterranean Sea. Fully furnished with professionally curated interiors, turnkey and ready to enjoy from day one. This exclusive top-floor residence boasts two private terraces totalling 100m2 with a plunge pool and the very best views across the sea and mountain backdrop.

title: Higueron, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description: Welcome to the highly sought-after Higueron area on the Costa del Sol. The Niagara Garden Villa is located in the new Waterfall Residences, offering breathtaking Mediterranean views. The villa apartment boasts a private 100m2 garden with pool and terrace, underfloor heating, two garage spaces, and individual lockable storage cabinets for each owner. Malaga is just 20 minutes away and Marbella within 25 minutes.

title: Marbella, Spain — 4-Bed Villa With Jacuzzi
description: Nestled atop picturesque Benahavis, this stunning villa sits 400 meters above sea level with breathtaking sea views surrounded by pine and cork trees. Located in an exclusive gated community just 20 minutes from Marbella. Spanning 255m2 on a single floor, the villa features an expansive living area, fully equipped kitchen, and large terrace with pool, infinity jacuzzi, and barbecue area. Sold fully furnished with underfloor heating throughout.

title: Benahavis, Spain — 3-Bed Villa With Fireplace
description: An immense terrace with a sea view. The 165m2 of indoor and outdoor spaces in this Benahavis penthouse are designed to maximize outdoor enjoyment. This completely remodeled penthouse features an open-plan living-dining area with a high-end kitchen and wine storage. A spiral staircase leads to a rooftop terrace with a solarium, pergola, and BBQ area for late Mediterranean evenings.

title: Higueron, Spain — 5-Bed Villa With Sea Views
description: Welcome to The Bay, an exquisite villa in the coveted Higueron area with spectacular sea views. Nestled in the hillside, this extraordinary home offers an unparalleled living experience. Boasting five tastefully designed bedrooms, the villa provides the utmost comfort to its owners. Every detail is evident from the meticulously chosen materials and curated furnishings, to the well-equipped home gym and underfloor heating throughout.
